display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Operator asks for a Compass sync or says 'full Compass refresh' in prose

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
odylith compass refresh
--wait for synchronous proof
--status for current refresh state

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
One bounded refresh contract only
no second deep-refresh or legacy full lane

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Input resolution
repo root, runtime mode, prior runtime

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Projection inputs loaded
workstreams, plans, bugs, diagrams, shell state

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Activity events collected
commits, local changes, plan/bug rows, Codex stream

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Window facts and verified scopes built
24h and 48h packets, verified_scoped_workstreams

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Scope Signal Ladder applied
R0-R5, promoted_default, budget_class

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reuse fingerprints computed
global + scoped exact/runtime reuse checks

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Exact narrated runtime or cache reuse valid?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Serve narrated cache
hot path stays cheap

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Cold miss or invalidated cache

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bounded sync refresh does not buy
a fresh global provider call on a cold miss

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Serve factual floor now
deterministic or unavailable but still current

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Enqueue maintained-cache warming request
for missing global narrated briefs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Verified scoped activity in this exact window?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Quiet scoped state
preserve deep link, show honest no-activity brief,
empty timeline, never borrow global cards

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Scope rung and budget class?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
R2 verified_local / R3 active_scope
selector visible, exact cache first,
sync path stays cache or deterministic

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
R4 actionable_priority / R5 blocking_frontier
eligible for fresh provider work on cold sync miss

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Fresh scoped narration uses bounded packs
up to 12 scopes per provider batch

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Request file carries only missing narrated globals
plus scoped R3+ packets that still matter

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Dedupe by fingerprint, terminal state, and active worker pid

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cheap provider-neutral structured profile
Codex => gpt-5.3-codex-spark low
Claude => cheap low-effort structured lane

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Warm global briefs one-by-one

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Warm scoped briefs in bounded packs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Runtime input fingerprint still matches
the current snapshot?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Patch current runtime payload
replace floor/quiet state with provider or cache

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Do not patch
leave newer runtime truth intact

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
No provider available
record provider_unavailable and stop

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Provider returned empty or invalid brief
one empty retry, one repair pass, then fail closed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Changed fact packet, stricter voice contract, or stale cache
invalidate reuse instead of replaying old prose

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Governance-only churn, broad fanout, and generated-only noise
stay low-rung so Compass does not waste spend or lie about scope

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Performance and cost contract
hot exact reuse under 50ms internal
cold bounded refresh under 1s internal
default refresh tries to spend 0 fresh model calls

div.style: color: rgb(31, 53, 95) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cold reinstall path is truthful but staged:
refresh rebuilds facts first, serves bounded coverage now,
then the sidecar warms narrated cache and patches only if the same runtime snapshot is still current.
